original_title: EKDV-643 When I missed the last train and stayed at home, my serious subordinates showed me a bitch that I could not imagine from the appearance of working ... Rin Kira
overview: I decided to stay at home for my subordinates who couldn't go home until midnight. Yoshiyoshi usually had a serious impression and thought that he wouldn't have to worry about sexuality, but when he got home, he took off his glasses and was in a "female mode". Flickering your chest and thighs, kissing yourself confused ... and just as it goes. The unexpected development was not over. The next morning, if I think I've been taking a break from the company and trying to do something more comfortable, I'll call my business partner Imeken and tell him to do 3P! It was such a bitch!
